title: Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up (Official Music Video)
summary: The official music video for Rick Astley's 1987 hit 'Never Gonna Give You Up', a quintessential 80s dance-pop track famous for its role in the 'Rickroll' internet meme. It features Astley's signature deep vocals and energetic dance moves across various London locations.
key_points: Astley showcases his soulful voice and shuffling dance style in iconic 80s outfits.
The video was filmed in diverse London settings including the Harrow Club and Freston Road.
The song's themes of devotion and commitment have made it a timeless cultural phenomenon.
